subcodes.first_line: O Jud! Upon thee be the bounty of God and His loving-kindness, and the grace of God and His mercy. Be thou at peace and among the thankful ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا جود علیک جود الله و عنایته و فضل الله و رحمته ان اطمئن و کن من الشاکرین
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
